subsections.title: Step Definition
content: Install and configure Claude Code via Node

subsections.title: Input
content: - Input Name: Install and Configure Claude Code
- Input Description: Install and configure Claude Code based on Node environment
# Configure environment variables (using ~/.bashrc as example, similar for ~/.zshrc, etc.)
# Start confirmation command, enter 'claude' to launch CLI. Configuration is complete when you receive corresponding responses without errors after inputting any text

subsections.title: Output
content: - Output Name: Available Claude Code Service
- Output Description: Use Claude Code to generate PRD files for the target website

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: Generate website PRD via Claude Code

subsections.title: Participants
content: - Skill Requirements: Knowledge of product and website building, familiar with markdown format

subsections.title: Input
content: - Input Name: Generate Website PRD via Claude Code
- Input Description: Interact with Claude Code one or more times to generate a markdown format PRD file
# Place existing materials in the project root directory, then launch Claude Code
> Generate a website PRD based on existing materials and save as an md file
# If unsatisfied with the generated PRD, continue the conversation. The md file will be updated in real-time by the AI until it meets requirements

subsections.title: Output
content: - Output Description: A markdown format PRD file that meets requirements

subsections.title: Participants
content: - Skill Requirements: Knowledge of product and website building

subsections.title: Input
content: - Input Name: Generate Final Website via Lovable
- Input Description: Based on the PRD generated by Claude Code, interact with Lovable to generate the final website

Related operations: Visit https://lovable.dev/, click "Attach" in the bottom left to upload the PRD file, briefly describe the website building requirements, such as "Build the website based on the current PRD to implement all features of XXX website (including interactions)". If unsatisfied with details, continue the conversation to optimize

subsections.title: Output
content: - Output Description: A publicly accessible website prototype link
